reason: Reduce timeout from 5s to 2s and add module-level cache for shell env probe results

 import { basename } from "node:path"
 import { getLogger } from "./logging"

+const TIMEOUT = 2_000
+
+let _shellEnvironmentCache: Record<string, string> | null | undefined
 
 type Probe = { type: "Loaded"; value: Record<string, string> } | { type: "Timeout" } | { type: "Unavailable" }
